query: SELECT c.name, c.id, scr.expectedAnnualLoss, scr.expectedAnnualLossPct FROM companies c LEFT JOIN supplyChainRisks scr ON c.id = scr.companyId WHERE c.name IN ('CSX', 'MAGNA INTL.', 'COSTCO WHOLESALE', 'IDEMITSU KOSAN') ORDER BY c.name
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ovDZf4AdgM1wjio.bac7ad92b374 --database Rur7xAEUjvByHVg3PaP3cz --execute SELECT c.name, c.id, scr.expectedAnnualLoss, scr.expectedAnnualLossPct FROM companies c LEFT JOIN supplyChainRisks scr ON c.id = scr.companyId WHERE c.name IN ('CSX', 'MAGNA INTL.', 'COSTCO WHOLESALE', 'IDEMITSU KOSAN') ORDER BY c.name
